---
title: "StreamCurves - Current Session Dashboard"
subtitle: "Interactive Export View"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: true
params:
  session_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(tibble)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x)) y else x
}

if (is.null(params$session_dir) || !dir.exists(params$session_dir)) {
  stop("A valid session_dir parameter is required.")
}

session_dir <- normalizePath(params$session_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
context_path <- file.path(session_dir, "report_context.rds")
if (!file.exists(context_path)) {
  stop("report_context.rds was not found in session_dir.")
}

ctx <- readRDS(context_path)
session_meta <- ctx$session_meta %||% list()
metric_status <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$metric_status %||% tibble())
thresholds <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$threshold_rows %||% tibble())
decisions <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$current_decisions %||% tibble())
phase2_summary <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$phase2_summary %||% tibble())
regional_curves <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$regional_curves %||% tibble())
decision_history <- tibble::as_tibble(ctx$decision_history %||% tibble())

metric_status_table <- function(data) {
  DT::datatable(
    data,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(
      pageLength = 15,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      autoWidth = TRUE
    )
  )
}
```

## Overview

```{r overview, results='asis'}
kpi_card <- function(title, value, detail = NULL) {
  div(
    style = "padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid #d9d9d9; border-radius: 0.75rem; background: #f8f9fa;",
    tags$div(style = "font-size: 0.9rem; color: #666; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;", title),
    tags$div(style = "font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1;", value),
    if (!is.null(detail)) tags$div(style = "font-size: 0.85rem; color: #666; margin-top: 0.35rem;", detail)
  )
}

browsable(
  div(
    style = "display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;",
    kpi_card("Generated", session_meta$generated_at %||% "Unknown"),
    kpi_card("Summary Metrics", session_meta$metric_count %||% 0),
    kpi_card("Curves Ready", session_meta$complete_metrics %||% 0),
    kpi_card("Needs Review", session_meta$review_metrics %||% 0),
    kpi_card("Manual Curves", session_meta$manual_curve_metrics %||% 0),
    kpi_card("Regional Sets", session_meta$regional_curve_sets %||% 0)
  )
)
```

## Metric Status

```{r metric-status}
if (nrow(metric_status) == 0) {
  cat("No summary metrics are available in the current session.")
} else {
  metric_status |>
    select(
      display_name,
      status_label,
      selected_curve_stratification_label,
      recommended_curve_stratification_label,
      curve_summary,
      manual_curve_label,
      warning_summary
    ) |>
    metric_status_table()
}
```

## Reference Curve Thresholds

```{r thresholds}
if (nrow(thresholds) == 0) {
  cat("No current reference-curve thresholds are available.")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    thresholds,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE)
  )
}
```

## Stratification Decisions

```{r decisions}
if (nrow(decisions) == 0) {
  cat("No current stratification decisions are available.")
} else {
  decision_tbl <- decisions |>
    select(
      display_name,
      decision_type,
      selected_curve_stratification_label,
      recommended_curve_stratification_label,
      status_label,
      phase4_source,
      manual_curve_label
    )

  DT::datatable(
    decision_tbl,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE)
  )
}
```

## Phase 2 Summary

```{r phase2}
if (nrow(phase2_summary) == 0) {
  cat("No current Phase 2 summary is available.")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    phase2_summary,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE)
  )
}
```

## Regional Curves

```{r regional}
if (nrow(regional_curves) == 0) {
  cat("No regional curve outputs are available.")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    regional_curves,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE)
  )
}
```

## Decision History

```{r history}
if (nrow(decision_history) == 0) {
  cat("No decision history entries are available.")
} else {
  DT::datatable(
    decision_history,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    class = "compact stripe",
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE)
  )
}
```
